title: Registration page
heading: New client registration
lede: This is everything we need before your dog’s first stay. It takes about five minutes. Fields marked * are required.
petsHint: Add one card per dog. Vet records are attached per dog.
recordsHint: Attach a photo or PDF of each certificate. If you do not have the document to hand, fill in the dates anyway and bring it with you.
privacyNote: We use this information to care for your dog and to bill you. We do not sell it.
